text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🚀 According to assessments by U.S. intelligence and military senior officials, Iran still retains about 40% of its pre-war long-range strike drone arsenal, as well as 60% of the launchers for ballistic and cruise missiles. Meanwhile, during the two-week ceasefire period that began on April 8, more than 100 systems buried in caves and bunkers were recovered as a result of strikes by the U.S. and Israel, after excavators cleared the sealed entrances of underground bases…. 🔹 Additionally, some American assessments indicate that Iran may recover up to 70% of its pre-war missile stockpile, which was also buried in rubble due to attacks on bunkers and warehouses — officials told The New York Times about this. 🟦 This updated intelligence assessment fully relies on the intelligence evaluation released two weeks ago, which stated that during the military campaign, 30% of Iran's ballistic missile potential was destroyed, while 40% was trapped in underground missile bases due to the bombing and sealing of exits…. The location of the remaining 30% was unknown…. 🟥 Thus, Iran successfully used the ceasefire period to restore its military resources, but it is also noteworthy that, according to U.S. and Israeli officials, continuous surveillance and intelligence gathering are ongoing from satellites and many other monitoring means regarding where missile launcher complexes are moving and where the missile armaments are being transferred, stored, and kept…. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🚀 根据美国情报和高级军事官员的评估，伊朗仍保留了战前约40%的远程打击无人机库，以及60%的弹道导弹和巡航导弹发射装置。与此同时，在4月8日开始的两周停火期间，由于美国和以色列的打击，挖掘机清理了地下基地的密封入口，超过100个埋在洞穴和掩体中的系统被发现…… 🔹 此外，一些美国评估显示，伊朗可能会恢复其战前导弹库存的70%，这些库存也因对掩体和仓库的袭击而被埋在瓦砾中——官员们向《纽约时报》透露了这一点。 🟦 这一更新的情报评估完全依赖于两周前发布的情报评估，该评估指出，在军事行动期间，伊朗30%的弹道导弹潜力被摧毁，而40%因轰炸和出口被封锁而困在地下导弹基地中……其余30%的位置不明…… 🟥 因此，伊朗成功利用停火期恢复了其军事资源，但值得注意的是，据美国和以色列官员称，卫星和许多其他监测手段正在对导弹发射器综合体的移动位置以及导弹武器的转移、储存和存放地点进行持续的监视和情报收集…… 推文

text: WarMonitor He uses the same kind of theatrics to mislead Americans... think about that. text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 💀 The Horrifying Tragedy of Lienz: The Betrayal of Churchill and Roosevelt and the Bloody Fate of the Cossacks June 1945. World War II in Europe has just ended. In the Austrian town of Lienz, in the Drava River valley, tens of thousands of Cossacks are encamped — fighters who, driven by their hatred of Bolshevism, had taken up arms against the Soviet Union. Alongside them are Cossack émigré men who had fled the Bolshevik “Red Terror” back in the 1920s, as well as their wives, children, and elderly. They believe they are safe in British custody. But what they don’t know is that at the Yalta Conference, Stalin, Roosevelt, and Churchill had already decided their fate… 📜 Operation Keelhaul: Humans as Currency Under the Yalta agreements, the Western Allies were obligated to hand over to the Soviet Union all individuals who had been Soviet citizens before 1939. However, many of the Cossacks in Lienz were “White émigrés” who had never even held a Soviet passport, and under international law, the agreement did not apply to them. Despite this, British command chose to hand them all over anyway — to avoid what they saw as “unnecessary complications.” This became known as Operation Keelhaul — a term borrowed from a brutal naval punishment, meaning to drag a person beneath a ship’s hull. 🩸 The Massacre on the Drava River On June 1, 1945, when the British informed the Cossacks that they would be handed over to the Soviets, an indescribable hell broke out in the camps. The people knew what awaited them in the “socialist homeland” — execution or slow, agonizing death in the Gulag camps. Desperate Cossack officers began committing suicide right inside the camps. Mothers threw their own children into the muddy waters of the Drava River and followed them, choosing death over falling into the hands of Soviet executioners. Those who refused to board the trucks were forced by British soldiers with rifle butts and bayonets. This was one of the most shameful moments in the history of Western democracy. Churchill effectively committed a crime against humanity, sacrificing helpless and innocent people to their deaths. Once handed over, the filtering process began immediately. SMERSH operatives started executing officers right beside the train wagons. Cossack atamans — Krasnov, Shkuro, and others — were taken to Moscow and hanged in 1947. Tens of thousands of Cossack women and children were deported to Siberian camps, where most perished from starvation and brutal forced labor. The tragedy of Lienz is a bitter reminder that “great politics” is often written in the blood of ordinary people. The West traded the illusion of “peaceful coexistence” with Russia for tens of thousands of lives. Churchill and Roosevelt naïvely hoped that Stalin would “change,” that Russia would become a “better country” willing to cooperate. We should also remember that a similar pattern repeated in recent history with Georgia, when, under the illusion of a “reset,” Barack Obama effectively gave a green light in 2012 for the rise to power of “Georgian Dream,” seen by many as a metastasis of the Russian imperial system. Today, as some still speak of “great power interests” while ignoring the fate of smaller nations and groups, the example of Lienz should stand as a warning: Any compromise with Russia comes at a terrible human cost. Soviet propaganda concealed the Lienz tragedy for decades, while the West remained silent out of shame. But historical truth, like the waters of the Drava, cannot be buried forever. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 💀 利恩茨（Lienz）的可怕悲剧：丘吉尔和罗斯福的背叛与哥萨克人的血腥命运 1945年6月。欧洲的第二次世界大战刚刚结束。在奥地利的利恩茨镇，德拉瓦河谷中，数万名哥萨克人驻扎在那里——这些战士出于对布尔什维克主义的仇恨，拿起武器反对苏联。与他们在一起的还有早在20世纪20年代逃离布尔什维克“红色恐怖”的哥萨克移民，以及他们的妻子、孩子和老人。他们认为在英国的监管下是安全的。但他们不知道的是，在雅尔塔会议上，斯大林、罗斯福和丘吉尔已经决定了他们的命运…… 📜 龙骨拖行行动（Operation Keelhaul）：作为货币的人类 根据雅尔塔协议，西方盟国必须将1939年之前所有苏联公民身份的人移交给苏联。然而，利恩茨的许多哥萨克人是甚至从未持有过苏联护照的“白俄移民”，根据国际法，该协议并不适用于他们。尽管如此，英国指挥部还是选择将他们全部移交——以避免他们所认为的“不必要的复杂情况”。这被称为“龙骨拖行行动”——这个词借用了残酷的海军惩罚，意为将人拖在船体下方。 🩸 德拉瓦河大屠杀 1945年6月1日，当英国人通知哥萨克人他们将被移交给苏联人时，营地里爆发了无法形容的地狱。人们知道在“社会主义祖国”等待他们的是什么——处决或在古拉格集中营中缓慢而痛苦的死亡。绝望的哥萨克军官开始在营地内自杀。母亲们将自己的孩子扔进德拉瓦河的泥水中，随后也跳了下去，选择死亡而不是落入苏联刽子手的手中。那些拒绝登上卡车的人被英国士兵用枪托和刺刀强行驱赶。这是西方民主史上最可耻的时刻之一。丘吉尔实际上犯下了反人类罪，牺牲了无助和无辜的人民。一旦移交，筛选过程立即开始。契卡（SMERSH）特工开始在火车车厢旁处决军官。哥萨克首领——克拉斯诺夫（Krasnov）、什库罗（Shkuro）等人——被带到莫斯科，并于1947年被绞死。数以万计的哥萨克妇女和儿童被驱逐到西伯利亚集中营，大多数人死于饥饿和残酷的强迫劳动。利恩茨的悲剧是一个痛苦的提醒，即“大政治”往往是用普通人的鲜血写成的。西方用与俄罗斯“和平共处”的幻觉换取了数万人的生命。丘吉尔和罗斯福天真地希望斯大林会“改变”，希望俄罗斯会成为一个愿意合作的“更好的国家”。我们还应该记住，类似的模式在最近的格鲁吉亚历史上也重演过，当时在“重启”的幻觉下，巴拉克·奥巴马实际上在2012年为“格鲁吉亚梦想”党的上台开了绿灯，许多人认为这是俄罗斯帝国体系的转移。今天，当一些人仍然谈论“大国利益”而忽视较小国家和群体的命运时，利恩茨的例子应该成为一个警告：与俄罗斯的任何妥协都要付出可怕的人力代价。苏联的宣传掩盖了利恩茨悲剧几十年，而西方则因羞愧而保持沉默。但历史真相，就像德拉瓦河的水一样，永远无法被掩埋。 推文

text_zh: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 乌克兰海军今晚向罗斯托夫州塔甘罗格的 Atlant Aero 工厂发射了一枚海王星巡航导弹。据信该工厂正在生产无人机组件。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese army said it has reopened key roads and partially restored bridges in the south, with further repairs underway after damage from Israeli strikes in recent weeks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队表示，已重新开放了南部的主要道路并部分修复了桥梁，在近期遭受以色列袭击受损后，更多的修复工作正在进行中。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated In a world first, an interceptor drone launched from an unmanned surface platform shot down a Shahed per USF. The operation was carried out by the Nemesis 412 brigade. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045763052180549652/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 全球首例，一架从无人水面平台发射的拦截无人机击落了一架伊朗“见证者”（Shahed）无人机，据美国特种部队（USF）消息。此次行动由 Nemesis 412 旅执行。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045763052180549652/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 🗣️ “Whether people like Israel or not, it has proven to be a GREAT ally of the United States. They are courageous, bold, loyal, and smart — and unlike others who reveal their true colors in times of conflict and stress, Israel fights hard and knows how to win.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：🗣️ “无论人们是否喜欢以色列，它都已被证明是美国伟大的盟友。他们勇敢、大胆、忠诚且聪明——与那些在冲突和压力时刻露出真面目的其他人不同，以色列战斗顽强，并且懂得如何获胜。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh has stated that no date has been set for the next round of peace negotiations between Iran and the United States, following last weekend’s talks in Islamabad which failed to achieve an agreement, despite claims by U.S. President Donald J. Trump that there would be more direct talks this weekend in Pakistan. “We are now focusing on finalising ⁠the framework of understanding between two sides. We don't want to enter into any negotiation or meeting which is doomed to fail and which can be a pretext for another round of escalation,” Khatibzadeh told reporters on the sidelines of a diplomacy forum Saturday in Turkey. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提布扎德（Saeed Khatibzadeh）表示，继上周末在伊斯兰堡举行的会谈未能达成协议后，伊朗与美国下一轮和平谈判尚未确定日期，尽管美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普声称本周末在巴基斯坦会有更多直接会谈。“我们现在专注于敲定双方的谅解框架。我们不想进入任何注定失败且可能成为新一轮升级借口的谈判或会议，”哈提布扎德周六在土耳其外交论坛间隙告诉记者。推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine's Navy reported an overnight Neptune missile strike on the Atlant Aero UAV plant in Taganrog. The facility produced Molniya strike-reconnaissance drones, Orion components, and other UAV and space tech parts. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045761329084920054/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰海军报告称，昨晚使用“海王星”导弹袭击了位于塔甘罗格的 Atlant Aero 无人机工厂。该设施生产“闪电”（Molniya）打击侦察无人机、“猎户座”（Orion）无人机组件以及其他无人机和航天技术零件。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045761329084920054/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 An Israeli military official told Maariv: "We and the Americans are prepared for the possibility of a sudden collapse of the ceasefire with Iran. We have updated the target bank, and the Military Intelligence Directorate (AMAN) is monitoring developments in Iran. Iranian energy facilities will be among our targets if fighting resumes". tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 一位以色列军方官员告诉《晚报》（Maariv）：“我们和美国人已为与伊朗的停火协议可能突然破裂做好了准备。我们已经更新了目标库，军事情报局（AMAN）正在监测伊朗的事态发展。如果战斗恢复，伊朗的能源设施将成为我们的目标之一”。推文

text: WarTranslated At the European Judo Championships in Georgia, Russians were allowed to compete under their flag. When one Russian won, the crowd booed during the medal ceremony. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045760454241223132/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 在格鲁吉亚举行的欧洲柔道锦标赛上，俄罗斯选手被允许以其国旗名义参赛。当一名俄罗斯选手获胜时，观众在颁奖仪式上发出嘘声。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045760454241223132/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 ✈️ ⚠️ — Atypical traffic is being broadcast by the USAF Mercury E-6B "Doomsday planes" issued on radio networks of U.S. Strategic Command (STRATCOM). In total, in one of the streams, a 12 group message is observed https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045757790103146691/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 ✈️ ⚠️ — 美国空军的“末日飞机” E-6B“水星”正在美国战略司令部（STRATCOM）的无线电网络上广播异常流量。总的来说，在一个数据流中观察到了一个 12 组的消息。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045757790103146691/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : It’s being reported agents are now resorting to “creative measures” to get Kash Patel to show up for work… https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045585919026057508/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : 据报道，特工们现在正采取“创造性措施”让卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）去上班…… https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045585919026057508/photo/1 推文

text: After Easter, Trump issued a stark 12-hour ultimatum, warning Iran a “civilization” would be destroyed if no deal was reached. Behind the scenes, aides—including Marco Rubio—saw it as a pressure tactic to force negotiations. Trump’s goal, advisers said, was to intimidate Iran into ending the war. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 复活节后，特朗普发出了严厉的 12 小时最后通牒，警告伊朗如果达不成协议，一个“文明”将被摧毁。据幕后消息，包括马可·卢比奥（Marco Rubio）在内的助手们将其视为迫使谈判的压力策略。顾问们表示，特朗普的目标是恐吓伊朗以结束战争。来源：华尔街日报

text: Trump is privately grappling with the risk of sending troops into danger, knowing some won’t return. He has resisted plans to seize Kharg Island—despite assurances of success—because he fears the operation would lead to heavy U.S. casualties, warning soldiers would be “sitting ducks.” Source: WSJ
text_zh: 特朗普私下里正在权衡派遣军队进入危险境地的风险，因为他知道有些人将无法回来。尽管有人保证行动会成功，但他仍抵制夺取哈尔克岛（Kharg Island）的计划，因为他担心该行动会导致美国士兵伤亡惨重，并警告士兵们将成为“活靶子”。来源：华尔街日报

text: Trump: Whether people like Israel or not, they have proven to be a GREAT Ally of the United States of America. They are Courageous, Bold, Loyal, and Smart and, unlike others that have shown their true colors in a moment of conflict and stress, Israel fights hard, and knows how to WIN!
text_zh: 特朗普：无论人们是否喜欢以色列，他们都已被证明是美利坚合众国伟大的盟友。他们勇敢、大胆、忠诚且聪明，而且与那些在冲突和压力时刻露出真面目的其他人不同，以色列战斗顽强，并且懂得如何获胜！

text: JD Vance: Pope Leo preaches the gospel, as he should, and that will inevitably mean he offers his opinions on the moral issues of the day. The President–and the entire administration–work to apply those moral principles in a messy world. He will be in our prayers, and I hope that we'll be in his.
text_zh: JD·万斯（JD Vance）：利奥教皇正在传福音，正如他应该做的那样，这意味着他不可避免地会对当下的道德问题发表意见。总统——以及整个政府——致力于在混乱的世界中应用这些道德原则。他会在我们的祈祷中，我也希望我们会在他的祈祷中。

text: WarMonitor It’s more active than usual, but hard to draw conclusions from traffic alone, especially when they know the OSINT community is listening. 🚨 HAPPENING NOW: More atypical traffic is being broadcast by the Mercury E-6B "Doomsday planes". A 12 group message. This could be part of something big. https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2045723639140540520/video/1 - NEET INTEL tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 流量比平时更活跃，但仅凭流量很难得出结论，尤其是当他们知道开源情报（OSINT）社区正在监听时。🚨 正在发生：E-6B“水星”末日飞机正在广播更多异常流量。一条 12 组的消息。这可能是大事的一部分。https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2045723639140540520/video/1 - NEET INTEL 推文

text: Open Source Intel Javier Milei is set to land in Israel within the hour. He will meet with PM Netanyahu, take part in an early torch-lighting ceremony recording, and visit the Western Wall. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045751813983305773/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈维尔·米莱（Javier Milei）预计将于一小时内抵达以色列。他将与内塔尼亚胡总理会面，参加一场提前录制的点火仪式，并参观西墙。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045751813983305773/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Palestinians hold a “Globalize the intifada” protest in NYC yesterday https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045751270548312349/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴勒斯坦人昨天在纽约市举行了“全球化起义”（Globalize the intifada）抗议活动 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045751270548312349/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Al Jazeera: Pakistan is growing increasingly pessimistic about U.S.–Iran talks, with Tehran refusing to budge on its red lines around uranium enrichment and nuclear capabilities. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 半岛电视台：巴基斯坦对美伊会谈越来越悲观，德黑兰拒绝在铀浓缩和核能力方面的红线问题上让步。推文

text: Open Source Intel Samir Geagea leader of the Lebanese Forces Party: “If it weren't for Hezbollah and its weapons, we wouldn't need a ceasefire. If it weren't for Hezbollah and its weapons, there wouldn't be an Israeli occupation. If it weren't for Hezbollah and its weapons, we wouldn't have prisoners. If it weren't for Hezbollah and its weapons, we wouldn't have displaced people. If it weren't for Hezbollah and its weapons, we wouldn't need reconstruction.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩力量党领导人萨米尔·贾贾（Samir Geagea）：“如果不是因为真主党及其武器，我们就不需要停火。如果不是因为真主党及其武器，就不会有以色列的占领。如果不是因为真主党及其武器，我们就不会有囚犯。如果不是因为真主党及其武器，我们就不会有流离失所者。如果不是因为真主党及其武器，我们就不需要重建。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s parliamentary speaker says talks with the U.S. have advanced, but major gaps remain and a final deal is still distant. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045748553708982309/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长表示，与美国的会谈取得了进展，但仍存在重大分歧，最终协议尚遥远。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045748553708982309/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ Qalibaf: On some issues, we insist and these demands are non-negotiable.bThese issues are one or two. They also have red lines. Overall, it must be said that we have made progress but the gaps are still large The enemy is definitely still there ready to ambush us. All its efforts are to break the unity and solidarity of the people. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ 卡利巴夫（Qalibaf）：在某些问题上，我们坚持立场，这些要求是不可谈判的。这些问题有一两个。他们也有红线。总的来说，必须说我们取得了进展，但差距仍然很大。敌人绝对还在那里准备伏击我们。它所有的努力都是为了破坏人民的团结和凝聚力。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Qalibaf on negotiations in Pakistan: Mr. Vance told me he came in good faith. I told him in my tweet, which you also read, that we also came in good faith but have no trust in you. First, you must build trust. No negotiations took place before the ceasefire. Trump is a master of lying. They say psychological warfare. He posted 8 tweets, 7 of which were lies. The issue of releasing frozen funds was also among our demands that had to be resolved, and we said if these two (Ceasefire in Lebanon & Iran's frozen funds) issues are not resolved, we will not enter into discussions about the other 10 points. These negotiations did not resolve our distrust, but both the American delegation and we gained a more realistic understanding of each other Some issues in the negotiations have been concluded, some have not. We are still far from a final agreement. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 卡利巴夫谈巴基斯坦谈判：万斯先生告诉我他是带着诚意来的。我在推文中告诉他，你也读到了，我们也是带着诚意来的，但对你们没有信任。首先，你们必须建立信任。停火前没有进行任何谈判。特朗普是撒谎大师。他们说是心理战。他发了 8 条推文，其中 7 条是谎言。释放冻结资金的问题也是我们必须解决的要求之一，我们说如果这两个问题（黎巴嫩停火和伊朗冻结资金）不解决，我们就不会讨论其他 10 点。这些谈判没有消除我们的不信任，但美国代表团和我们都对彼此有了更现实的了解。谈判中的一些问题已经达成结论，一些还没有。我们距离最终协议还很远。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The Investigative Committee of Russia classifies the actions of Ukrainian armed formations in the Donetsk and Lugansk People's Republics as genocide As a result, since 2014, nearly 5,000 civilians have been killed and more than 13,000 have been injured, according to the Investigative Committee of Russia. Charges have been brought against 41 representatives of Ukraine's top political and military leadership. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯调查委员会将乌克兰武装编队在顿涅茨克和卢甘斯克人民共和国的行动定性为种族灭绝。据俄罗斯调查委员会称，自 2014 年以来，已有近 5000 名平民丧生，超过 13000 人受伤。乌克兰最高政治和军事领导层的 41 名代表已被起诉。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ Qalibaf on the situation in Strait of Hormuz: I should also say that today the Strait of Hormuz is under the control of the Islamic Republic of Iran. When the US wanted to send a minesweepers, we announced that if they send it, we will shoot them, and get back to war. My brother Mr. Abdollahi said that the American minesweepers are in an area where if it moves forward, we will strike it. We told the American side they had 15 minutes to turn back, and they were ordered to return and did so. Now it has been 2 or 3 days that they have blockaded so that everyone goes and Iran does not go. This is a reckless decision. How can everyone go and we do not? This is not possible. If they do not lift the blockade, traffic restrictions will definitely be imposed in the strait. We also told Mr. Asim Munir, the commander of the Pakistan Army, that the other side should not do anything to break the ceasefire. Each of us has a commitment and must fulfill it there. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ 卡利巴夫谈霍尔木兹海峡局势：我还想说，今天霍尔木兹海峡处于伊朗伊斯兰共和国的控制之下。当美国想要派遣扫雷舰时，我们宣布如果他们派遣，我们将向他们开火，并回到战争状态。我的兄弟阿卜杜拉希先生说，美国的扫雷舰所在区域如果再向前移动，我们将对其进行打击。我们告诉美方他们有 15 分钟的时间掉头，他们接到命令返回并照做了。现在已经两三天了，他们封锁了海峡，让所有人都能通过，唯独伊朗不能。这是一个鲁莽的决定。怎么能让所有人通过而我们不能？这是不可能的。如果他们不解除封锁，海峡内肯定会实施交通限制。我们也告诉了巴基斯坦陆军司令阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）先生，另一方不应做任何破坏停火的事情。我们每个人都有承诺，必须在那里履行。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 The Speaker of Iranian Parliament General Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf on Lebanon: Hezbollah has been fighting the Zionist regime for many years, but the recent war was carried out by Hezbollah because of Iran, and the resistance front came to the aid of the Islamic Republic, so the ceasefire must definitely include them as well. They wanted passage through in the strait to become normal; we too have been seeking that from the start, but our condition was that a ceasefire be established in Lebanon. The Prime Minister and President of Lebanon, who are affiliated with the US, made some statements but the ceasefire with Hezbollah was part of our agreement with the US. We warned that if the ceasefire was not implemented, in one hour we would strike Israel with missiles. Israel said to hit 9 other locations in Beirut and then the ceasefire would happen. We said if you hit, we will hit you too. The ceasefire was established in Lebanon at that moment. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf）谈黎巴嫩：真主党与犹太复国主义政权斗争多年，但最近的战争是真主党因伊朗而进行的，抵抗阵线前来援助伊斯兰共和国，因此停火必须绝对包括他们。他们希望海峡通行正常化；我们从一开始也一直在寻求这一点，但我们的条件是在黎巴嫩建立停火。隶属于美国的黎巴嫩总理和总统发表了一些声明，但与真主党的停火是我们与美国协议的一部分。我们警告说，如果停火不执行，我们将在一小时内用导弹打击以色列。以色列说打击贝鲁特的另外 9 个地点，然后停火就会发生。我们说如果你打击，我们也会打击你。停火在那一刻在黎巴嫩建立。🚩 @RezistanceTrench
